notes: Chunk 61 DONE (Template A, Tier B, 25 routes): Baltic EE/LV/LT to Caucasus/Central Asia AM/GE/AZ/KZ x12 (low complexity, 4-6 weeks); reverse AM/GE/AZ/KZ to EE/LV/LT x12 (high complexity, FAVN titre + 90-day wait, 20-26 weeks); Lithuania to Uganda x1 (high complexity, MAAIF permit). counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
